name: Test databao build with BigQuery using BigQueryServiceAccountKeyFileAuth auth type
description: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with BigQuery and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''bigquery''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'

steps.name: Answering prompt ''Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'' with ''y''
